content.text: A date field is used to input a date.
A time field is used to input a time.

body.code:
import {Field} from 'alinea'

Field.date('Date field')
Field.time('Time field')

content.text: Prefills the field’s value. For example, you can prefill it with today’s date.

body.code:
const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
Field.date('Date (initialValue: today)')
